# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 0.1.x   | Yes       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in jem-sec-attest, please report it through
[GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting](https://github.com/Jem-Open/jem-sec-attest/security/advisories/new).

**Do NOT open public GitHub issues for security vulnerabilities.**

### Response Timeline

- **Acknowledgement**: within 3 business days
- **Initial assessment**: within 7 business days
- **Fix target**: within 30 days for critical/high severity

### Technical Security Details

For details on the platform's built-in security controls (tenant isolation, secret management,
configuration validation), see [docs/SECURITY.md](../docs/SECURITY.md).
